name: pi-web-lite
description: Lightweight web_search and fetch tools for Pi with Exa, Tavily, Brave, auto priority, and balanced provider-key pools.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.ts && node --check src/config.ts && node --check src/search.ts && node --check src/fetch.ts && node --check src/providers/exa.ts && node --check src/providers/tavily.ts && node --check src/providers/brave.ts
